# Memes de Julio

> A fun Argentine website featuring Julio Iglesias memes — one new meme every day during July. A beloved internet tradition in Argentina and Latin America where people celebrate the month of "julio" (July) with memes of the Spanish singer Julio Iglesias. The rest of the year, the site displays a countdown to the next July 1st.

## About

- The site is in Argentine Spanish (es-AR)
- Every meme features or references Julio Iglesias, the Spanish singer, playing on the double meaning of "julio" (the month and his name)
- During July (days 1-31), visitors see a randomly selected Julio Iglesias meme for that day
- Outside July, visitors see a countdown showing days remaining until July 1st
- After July ends (August-December), a "see you next year" message is shown
- Each meme can be shared via a direct link using the `?id=` query parameter

## Content

- [Home](https://memesdejulio.com.ar/): Main page with daily meme or countdown
- [Meme Catalog](https://memesdejulio.com.ar/memes.json): JSON catalog of all 31 days of memes with alt text

## Contact

- Email: memes@memesdejulio.com.ar
